instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: tuscan vineyard golden hour.

Patch:
- remove sv_026-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_026-polygon-002.fill: "#3b82f6" -> "#a8602c"
- download-sv_026-circle-001.cx: 1255.0 -> 1180
- download-sv_026-rect-002.opacity: 0.23 -> 0.5
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky06" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#f7c873" />
      <stop offset="0.4" stop-color="#f6b06a" />
      <stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#f0d2a0" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#fbeccb" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sun06" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fffae8" /><stop offset="0.4" stop-color="#fff0c0" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffd98c" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="hill06a" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#c9b87a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#b8a566" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="hill06b" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#a8a35a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#8f9648" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="hill06c" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7e8a3e" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#637a32" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="hill06d" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#566a2c" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#3e5420" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="haze06" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="20" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky06)" id="download-sv_026-rect-001" />
  <circle cx="1255" cy="240" r="300" fill="url(#sun06)" id="download-sv_026-circle-001" />
  <circle cx="1180" cy="240" r="80" fill="#fffbef" id="download-sv_026-circle-002" />

  
  <rect x="0" y="380" width="1600" height="100" fill="#fff0cc" opacity="0.23" filter="url(#haze06)" id="download-sv_026-rect-002" />

  
  <path d="M0 460 Q400 400 800 450 Q1200 500 1600 440 L1600 560 L0 560 Z" fill="url(#hill06a)" opacity="0.7" id="download-sv_026-path-001" />
  <path d="M0 520 Q300 470 700 510 Q1100 550 1600 500 L1600 640 L0 640 Z" fill="url(#hill06b)" id="download-sv_026-path-002" />
  
  <path d="M0 600 Q400 540 820 590 Q1200 640 1600 580 L1600 760 L0 760 Z" fill="url(#hill06c)" id="download-sv_026-path-003" />

  </g>

    <rect x="178" y="40" width="16" height="22" fill="#6a4a2a" id="download-sv_026-rect-009" />
  </g>
  
  <g fill="#3e5022">
    <ellipse cx="600" cy="500" rx="16" ry="80" id="download-sv_026-ellipse-006" /><ellipse cx="810" cy="500" rx="16" ry="80" id="download-sv_026-ellipse-007" />

    <path d="M900 720 L1320 1000" id="download-sv_026-path-011" /><path d="M920 722 L1520 1000" id="download-sv_026-path-012" />
  </g>
  
  <g fill="#4a6624" opacity="0.8">
    <circle cx="300" cy="900" r="10" id="download-sv_026-circle-003" /><circle cx="500" cy="940" r="11" id="download-sv_026-circle-004" /><circle cx="700" cy="960" r="10" id="download-sv_026-circle-005" />

  <g fill="#33441c">

<circle id="sv_026-extra-survey-marker" cx="1200" cy="110" r="35" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.82" stroke="#111827" stroke-width="5" /></svg>
